titleStmt.title: SII 34.181: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 181. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the first prākāra of the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga I, 38th year, Karkaṭaka, sudi, . . ., Pūrva-Phālgunī Monday = A.D. 1108.

It is said that Rājādhirājaṉ Vīranārāyaṇaṉ hailing from North Koṅgu made a gift of land for providing two potfuls of water for the sacred bath in the temple of Tiruvāṭpōkkimalai-Mahādēva. The donor purchased the land, freed from taxes, from the sabhā of Kuḻittaṇḍalai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷp puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭicūṭi villavar nilaikeṭa vi
ṉavar riyaluṟṟiḻitara tikkaṉaittun taṉcakkara naṭātti vīrasiṅhāsaṉattu Avaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷōṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōvirājakēcari panmarāṉa śrīkulōttuṅ
ka cōḻadevaṟki yāṇṭu 3 10 8 Āvatu rājamahēntravaḷa nāṭṭu mīkōṭṭu nāṭṭu brahmadeyaṅ kuḻittaṇṭalai peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm Ivvāṇṭuk kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūrvva
yaiyum pūramum peṟṟa tiṅkaḷ kiḻamai nāḷ Ivvūr naṭuviṟ tirumuṟṟattu rājēntracōḻaṉ tirumaṇṭapattē taṉmi ceytu kūṭṭa kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Iṉnāṭṭu kuṟunāka nāṭṭuvā
ḻppōkkimalai mahādevaṟkku vaṭakkil koṅkil rājādhirājaṉ vīranārāyaṇaṉ Ittēvaṟkku tirumañcaṇakkuṭam Iraṇṭum nittam Ēṟukaikku koṇṭa nilamāvatu Ivvūrampalattu mahā
tēva vatikku kiḻakku kaṟṟaḷivākkālukku teṟkku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu 3 catirattu mōdivaraṉ viṣṇuviṉ nilam ṉālumāviṉ kīḻ Orumākkāṇi Araikāṇi mun=tirikaiyum vācciyaṉ kāri
ratavaṉ nilattu kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Orumāmukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Iṅkē mūṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mūṉṟāñ catirattuk kaviran=ti nārāyaṇaṉ tiruvempaṉār nilam nālu
māviṉ kīḻmukkālē Iraṇṭumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Āka tiruvulakaḷantaruḷinapaṭi nilam Arai Iṉnilam Araiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttu Ikkōyilil taṇṭēśva
radevar śrīhastattāl koṇṭa kācu 4 Iṉ nilattukku Iṟaiyiṟukka kaṭavōmāka Iṟaikāval koṇṭa kācu 2 10 Irupatum Āka kācu Irupattu nālum koṇṭu 1/2
nilam cantrātityaval nāṅkaḷē Iṟai Iṟukka kaṭavōmāka viṟṟukkuṭuttōm tiruvāḻppōkkimalai mahādevarkku peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm Iṉnilattukku Itu
vē vilai māvaṟutip poruḷ cilavōlaiyum Ituvēy Ituvallatu vēṟu porumāvaṟutiporuḷ cilavōlai
kāṭṭak kaṭavār Allātārākavum Ipparicicai
kikkaṭavavōmākavum Iṉnilattukku catira
kuṭuttōm peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm kāśyapaṉ
paṇiyālum Āra �ṉ cōlaiyānapa
Ivvūr madhyastaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ
lairiman=tamāka ceytēṉ vaṭakkil koṅkil ceṅkīrai rājādhirājaṉ vīranārāyaṇanēṉ Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.181 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
